title: Rima Hassan Is Charged With Glorifying Terrorism Online in Social Media Post
summary_full: Rima Hassan, a member of the European Parliament, could face seven years in prison for the post, in which she quoted a perpetrator of a 1972 massacre in Israel.
summary_public: Rima Hassan, a member of the European Parliament, could face seven years in prison for the post, in which she quoted a perpetrator of a 1972 massacre in Israel.
